name: Up and Down

setup.description: Drop 10 balls just off the green in a mix of lies — rough, fringe, light rough. From each, chip or pitch it on, then putt out.

rules.description: Play each ball as its own up-and-down: one short-game shot to get on, then finish it out on the green.
scoring: 1 point for every ball holed in 2 total strokes or fewer

caption: The shot that saves rounds. Ten lies, ten chances to get up and down. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
